title: Zap-Shift-Delivery
description: A complete MERN-based delivery, shift & order management system built for small to mid-size businesses. Zap-Shift helps admins create delivery tasks, assign riders, manage shifts, and track real-time status updates. The platform includes dynamic role-based dashboards, optimized routing, and secure authentication. It focuses on reducing delivery delays and improving workforce management efficiency.
features: 📦 Real-time delivery and task tracking
👤 Role-based dashboards (Admin, Rider, User)
🕒 Shift scheduling with availability management
📍 Live status updates for each delivery
📊 Admin analytics panel with charts
🔐 JWT Authentication + Secure API Architecture
⚡ Responsive UI with animated transitions
🌙 Dark mode optimized UI
challenges_solved: Optimized database queries to reduce delivery load time
Managed complex state for real-time order updates
Designed scalable backend structure for future expansion

title: Local-Food-Lovers-Network
description: A community-driven food review and discovery platform designed for local food lovers. Users can explore restaurants, post their own reviews, rate dishes, and interact with other food enthusiasts. The system features user profiles, review history, and restaurant ranking logic. Built as a scalable MERN project focusing on user experience and clean UI.
features: ⭐ Users can add, edit, and delete reviews
🍽 Restaurant discovery with detailed pages
📸 Upload images of dishes and foods
🔍 Keyword & category-based restaurant search
❤️ Save favorite restaurants
👥 User profile dashboards
📝 Smart review sorting (Most helpful, Trending, Recent)
⚡ Fully responsive modern UI
challenges_solved: Implemented optimized search & sorting algorithm for reviews
Developed media upload system using Cloudinary
Improved site performance using lazy loading

title: Scholarship Management System
description: A comprehensive Scholarship Management Platform designed to facilitate students in discovering and applying for scholarships, while providing Admin and Moderator users with tools to manage applications and content.
features: 🔍 Advanced search and filtering (Category, Degree, Location)
💳 Secure Stripe payment integration for application fees
👥 Role-based dashboards (Admin, Moderator, and Student)
📊 Admin analytics for tracking users, fees, and applications
📝 Review and rating system for each scholarship
🔄 Real-time application status tracking (Pending, Processing, Completed)
🔒 Secure JWT-based authentication and role authorization
📱 Fully responsive UI with loading skeletons for better UX
challenges_solved: Implemented a complex multi-role dashboard with conditional routing
Integrated secure payment processing and handled success/failure states
Optimized filtering logic for large scholarship datasets

title: Seoul Mirage – Luxury Skincare
description: A premium, pixel-perfect e-commerce frontend concept for a luxury skincare brand. Features smooth page transitions, high-end typography, glassmorphic design elements, and interactive product grids optimized for conversions.
features: ✨ Premium luxury aesthetics with glassmorphism effects
🛍️ Interactive cart drawer with local state management
📱 Fully responsive grid optimized for mobile-first shoppers
🎭 Smooth micro-interactions and scroll-triggered animations
🔍 Advanced product filter by skin type and concerns
challenges_solved: Maintained crisp pixel-perfect layout alignment across all custom screens
Optimized large image loading utilizing Next.js Image component
Created physics-based fluid animations using Framer Motion

title: DevFixter Agency Landing Page
description: A modern, dark-themed SaaS and agency landing page designed to convert visitors into clients. It showcases tech stacks, services, dynamic client testimonials, and a custom interactive pricing calculator.
features: 🌙 Fully optimized premium dark-mode UI
📈 Interactive pricing matrix and subscription toggles
🚀 Optimized for Core Web Vitals with near-perfect Lighthouse score
📨 Dynamic floating contact form with client-side validation
⚡ Superfast loading with static asset optimization
challenges_solved: Achieved seamless 60fps animations for continuous client logo tickers
Configured global TypeScript interfaces for strict type-safe UI components
